title: Log Pressure Plates
description: Makes pressure plates look like logs!
body:
# Make Pressure Plates Look Like Logs!
Log pressure plates is a resource pack that does exactly what it sounds like. It makes the pressure plate textures look like logs! All wood pressure plates (except bamboo) have been changed to look like the tops of their respective logs instead of planks.

  This pack should be compatible with most other resource packs as it changes the pressure plates' models, *not* their textures (simply apply this pack above any other resource packs). This also helps reduce the file size.

  Compatible with versions **1.20.2 - 26.1.2** As of June 2, 2026.


```
Credits:

All models created by yumywafflz.
```
